reviews.comment:
Lamentablemente el ACA, terceriza el servicio y despues de las 18.00 hs. Hay que esperar 40 minutos aprox. Es un servicio al asociado que se debería dar con un poco mas de esmero.

(Translated by Google)
Unfortunately, the ACA outsources the service, and after 6:00 PM, you have to wait approximately 40 minutes. It's a service for members that should be provided with a bit more care.
